title: dryopteris × holttumii
intro: Dryopteris × holttumii, also known as the hybrid lady fern, is a rare and unique plant species resulting from the cross-breeding of two different lady fern species. It is primarily found in Southeast Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Dryopteris × holttumii can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal benefits and promote overall well-being.
